title: AXChipsLookType
description: Defines the appearance styles available for chips components. This type is a subset of AXStyleLookType, specifically excluding certain styles that are not applicable to chips.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Union type of supported look styles for chips.

props.name: AXChipsLookType
props.description: Look styles supported by chips (subset of AXStyleLookType).
